_metadata.description: Manual overrides for cert verification scope. Used when (a) the fuzzy resolver returns needs_review and a human confirms/downgrades, or (b) a known-good cert isn't in the public registry snapshots yet. Pattern matches scripts/data/curated_overrides/upc_overrides.json.
_metadata.usage: Consumed by scripts/cert_resolver.py BEFORE running the rapidfuzz match. Entries here win over registry lookups. See docs/plans/SCORING_V4_PROPOSAL.md §10.

status_meanings.verified: Manually confirmed by reviewer. Scorer trusts the scope.
status_meanings.pending_review: Auto-flagged by resolver as borderline (needs_review queue). Scorer treats as claimed_only (zero points) until reviewer marks verified.
status_meanings.rejected: Reviewer confirmed this is NOT a valid SKU-level match (regex hit but registry doesn't list this SKU). Scorer treats as claimed_only.

overrides.brand: Garden of Life Dr. Formulated Probiotics
overrides.reason: Registry row is Prenatal and Postnatal Daily Care; likely same line but name drift is clinically/market-significant enough to leave pending.
overrides.matched_product: Dr. Formulated Probiotics Prenatal and Postnatal Daily Care
